generated_figures.caption: Phase 16 six-method comparison: HPC vs SGD, EWC, SI, and TCL baselines on Split-CIFAR-10. HPC (ours, highlighted) is the autonomous TAR hypothesis.
TAR (Thermodynamic Active Research) autonomous research loop. Human review gates the transition from experiment queue to training worker.
Split-CIFAR-10 task structure: five sequential binary classification tasks. Forgetting is measured as the accuracy drop on previous tasks after each new task is learned.
